note: Moved next-hop/direct adjacency selection out of the generic FWD API into a per-media adjacency registry. Ethernet now registers an adjacency handler that resolves gateway routes to FIB next_hop_ip and direct routes to the IPv4 destination; PPP/Tunnel can later register their own handlers without changing the FWD dispatcher.
